preReview.title: New England Revolution v D.C. United: Flanagan exige resiliencia en medio de la racha de derrotas
preReview.description: Tanto el New England Revolution como el D.C. United buscarán poner fin a sus rachas sin victorias en la MLS en su enfrentamiento de la Conferencia Este.

preReview.title: New England Revolution contro D.C. United: Flanagan chiede resilienza in mezzo alla serie di sconfitte
preReview.description: Sia i New England Revolution che il D.C. United cercheranno di mettere fine alla loro serie di partite senza vittorie in MLS nel loro scontro della Eastern Conference.

preReview.title: New England Revolution x D.C. United: Flanagan exige resiliência em meio a série de derrotas
preReview.description: Tanto o New England Revolution quanto o D.C. United estão buscando encerrar suas sequências sem vitória na MLS em seu confronto pela Conferência Leste.

preReview.title: New England Revolution v D.C. United: Flanagan demands resilience amid losing run
preReview.description: Both the New England Revolution and D.C. United will be looking to end their winless runs in MLS in their Eastern Conference clash.

preReview.title: Nouvelle-Angleterre Révolution contre D.C. United : Flanagan exige de la résilience malgré une série de défaites
preReview.description: La Nouvelle-Angleterre Révolution et D.C. United chercheront tous deux à mettre fin à leurs séries sans victoire en MLS lors de leur affrontement dans la Conférence Est.

preReview.title: New England Revolution gegen D.C. United: Flanagan fordert Resilienz inmitten einer Niederlagenserie
preReview.description: Sowohl die New England Revolution als auch D.C. United werden in ihrem Duell in der Eastern Conference versuchen, ihre sieglosen Serien in der MLS zu beenden.

preReview.title: نيو إنجلاند ريفولوشن ضد دي. سي. يونايتد: فلاناغان يطلب الصمود وسط سلسلة الهزائم
preReview.description: كلا نيو إنجلاند ريفولوشن ودي. سي. يونايتد سيحاولان إنهاء سلسلتي عدم الفوز في الدوري الأمريكي للمحترفين في مباراتهما في المؤتمر الشرقي.

preReview.title: New England Revolution x D.C. United: Flanagan exige resiliência em meio a sequência de derrotas
preReview.description: Ambos, New England Revolution e D.C. United, estarão buscando encerrar suas sequências de jogos sem vitória na MLS em seu confronto da Conferência Leste.

QAData.question: Who won between New England Revolution and DC United on Sat, 09 Aug 2025 23:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: New England Revolution won 2–0 over DC United on Sat, 09 Aug 2025 23:30:00 GMT.
